title: EMPLOYER APPRECIATION
body:
I am so happy I got this job in the Museum Archives!

What an honor it has been to secure Monogon proprietary museum data !

I heard there may be a group of separatists sifting through and modifying structural components to the underlying structure of MythOS… They must be stopped, that's terrible!

At least I know they aren’t in HALFWAY PARK, that is where I go on my lunch breaks and its always carefully monitored.
This is the best job ever!

Thank you Monogon!,
-Chris
